comments.author: github-actions
comments.body:
**Audit PR Docs**: Inaccurate claim detected (pre-existing issue surfaced by full-doc audit).

Claim at line 645: "`objective-context` marker: stores objective issue number (triggers exit-plan-mode hook to suggest correct save command)"
Reality: This PR eliminates the `--objective-issue` flag. The hook no longer reads the marker to suggest a flag. Instead, `plan-save` reads the marker directly to link the objective. The hooks/erk.md and session-deduplication.md tables in this same PR correctly describe the new effect as "Read by plan-save to link objective".

Source: `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py:331-336` (marker read by plan-save)

Suggested fix: Line 645 — change to: ``objective-context` marker: stores objective issue number (read by plan-save to link the plan to its parent objective)`

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Fixed in e6f6ac0: Updated description to accurately state that objective-context marker is read by plan-save to link the plan to its parent objective.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-24 18:19 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier**: List comprehension with index [0] access - Consider using next() for clarity. Pattern like `[x for x in items if condition][0]` risks IndexError. Prefer: `next((line for line in result.output.strip().splitlines() if line.startswith("{")), None)` for more explicit error handling.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Fixed in e6f6ac0: Replaced list comprehension [0] access with next() for clarity.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-24 18:19 PST_
